name: test_quick_search_reservation_cancel_reservation_flow
statusTrace:
browser = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="7b7f574e863891fb61d3f7eee1cfccad")>
config = <tests.environment_config.StagingConfig object at 0x7f59bc14ab10>

    @pytest.mark.staging
    # @pytest.mark.production
    def test_quick_search_reservation_cancel_reservation_flow(browser, config):
        search_hotel = SearchHotelPage(browser)
        add_customer = AddCustomer(browser)
        add_tourists = AddTourists(browser)
        handle_reservation = HandleReservation(browser)
        details_reservation = DetailsReservation(browser)
        cancel_reservation_modal = CancelReservationModal(browser)
        search_reservation_page = SearchReservationPage(browser)
        wait = WebDriverWait(browser, 20)  # Set an explicit wait
    
        # search allotment room
        search_hotel.allotment_reservation(config)
    
        # Add client
        wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "addClientModalLabel")))  # Wait for client form
        add_customer.add_customer("gabriel.filip@wesrom.com")
    
        # Save reservation
        wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, '[name="doar_salveaza"]')))  # Wait for client form
        add_tourists.save_reservation()
    
        # Open reservation details
        handle_reservation.open_reservation_details()
    
        # Cancel reservation
        details_reservation.cancel_reservation()
        cancel_reservation_modal.delete_email()
        cancel_reservation_modal.select_cancel_reason("TEST")
        cancel_reservation_modal.type_email("gabriel.filip@wesrom.com")
        cancel_reservation_modal.press_cancel_reservation_button()
        time.sleep(5)
        browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[0])
    
        # Check if the reservation is correctly canceled
        browser.refresh()  # Refresh the page to reflect changes
        search_reservation_page.check_reservation_for_displayed_reservation(ReservationStatues.AN.value)
    
        handle_reservation.open_reservation_details()
        browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[1])
>       details_reservation.check_reservation_details("AN ( Anulata la data: ", " cu motivul: TEST de catre: wesrom )")
